mode.title: Scraper Mode
mode.description: Choose what to scrape: search notes, get note details, user profile, comments, or 'login' to save session

useSession.title: Use Saved Session
useSession.description: Whether to use the session saved in session.json (Local Only)

keyword.title: Search Keyword
keyword.description: Keyword to search for (used in search mode)

noteUrl.title: Note URL
noteUrl.description: Full URL of a Xiaohongshu note (used in note/comments mode)

userId.title: User ID
userId.description: Xiaohongshu user ID (used in user mode)

userUrl.title: User URL
userUrl.description: Full URL of a Xiaohongshu user profile (used in user mode)

limit.title: Result Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

cookie.title: Session Cookie
cookie.description: Copy your 'webId' or the full cookie string from your browser to bypass login/captcha

maxPages.title: Max Pages to Scroll
maxPages.description: Number of times to scroll down to load more results
